{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Enforcer binding
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|An [[Enforcer binding]] can be used to launch a person through the air.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can activate an [[Enforcer binding]] in his shield.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
